verses.latin_vulgate: Duodecim annorum erat Manasses cum regnare cœpisset, et quinquaginta quinque annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Haphsiba.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שְׁתֵּ֨ים עֶשְׂרֵ֤ה שָׁנָה֙ מְנַשֶּׁ֣ה בְמׇלְכ֔וֹ וַחֲמִשִּׁ֤ים וְחָמֵשׁ֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֥ם אִמּ֖וֹ חֶפְצִי־בָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Manasses was twelve years old when he began to reign, and he reigned five and fifty years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Haphsiba.
verses.finnish_biblia: Manasse oli kahdentoistakymmenen ajastaikainen tullessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi viisi ajastaikaa kuudettakymmentä Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä nimi oli Hephtsiba.
verses.king_james: Manasseh was twelve years old when he began to reign, and reigned fifty and five years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Hephzi–bah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque malum in conspectu Domini, juxta idola gentium quas delevit Dominus a facie filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּתֽוֹעֲבֹת֙ הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ הוֹרִ֣ישׁ יְהֹוָ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did evil in the sight of the Lord, according to the idols of the nations, which the Lord destroyed from before the face of the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki pahaa Herran edessä, pakanain kauhistusten jälkeen, jotka Herra Israelin lasten edestä oli ajanut pois.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord, after the abominations of the heathen, whom the Lord cast out before the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conversusque est, et ædificavit excelsa quæ dissipaverat Ezechias pater ejus : et erexit aras Baal, et fecit lucos sicut fecerat Achab rex Israël, et adoravit omnem militiam cæli, et coluit eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֗שׇׁב וַיִּ֙בֶן֙ אֶת־הַבָּמ֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר אִבַּ֖ד חִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ אָבִ֑יו וַיָּ֨קֶם מִזְבְּחֹ֜ת לַבַּ֗עַל וַיַּ֤עַשׂ אֲשֵׁרָה֙ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֗ה אַחְאָב֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיִּשְׁתַּ֙חוּ֙ לְכׇל־צְבָ֣א הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וַֽיַּעֲבֹ֖ד אֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he turned, and built up the high places, which Ezechias, his father, had destroyed: and he set up altars to Baal, and made groves, as Achab, the king of Israel, had done: and he adored all the host of heaven, and served them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakensi korkeudet jälleen, jotka hänen isänsä Hiskia kukistanut oli, ja nosti Baalin alttarin, ja teki metsistön, niinkuin Ahab Israelin kuningas tehnyt oli, ja kumarsi koko taivaan sotajoukkoa, ja palveli niitä,
verses.king_james: For he built up again the high places which Hezekiah his father had destroyed; and he reared up altars for Baal, and made a grove, as did Ahab king of Israel; and worshipped all the host of heaven, and served them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exstruxitque aras in domo Domini, de qua dixit Dominus : In Jerusalem ponam nomen meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָנָ֥ה מִזְבְּחֹ֖ת בְּבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר֙ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה בִּירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם אָשִׂ֥ים אֶת־שְׁמִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he built altars in the house of the Lord, of which the Lord said: In Jerusalem I will put my name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakensi myös alttarit Herran huoneesen, josta Herra sanonut oli: minä asetan minun nimeni Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And he built altars in the house of the Lord, of which the Lord said, In Jerusalem will I put my name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exstruxit altaria universæ militiæ cæli in duobus atriis templi Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֥בֶן מִזְבְּח֖וֹת לְכׇל־צְבָ֣א הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם בִּשְׁתֵּ֖י חַצְר֥וֹת בֵּית־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he built altars for all the host of heaven, in the two courts of the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rakensi koko taivaalliselle sotajoukolle alttarit molempiin pihoihin Herran huoneesen,
verses.king_james: And he built altars for all the host of heaven in the two courts of the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et traduxit filium suum per ignem : et ariolatus est, et observavit auguria, et fecit pythones, et aruspices multiplicavit, ut faceret malum coram Domino, et irritaret eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶעֱבִ֤יר אֶת־בְּנוֹ֙ בָּאֵ֔שׁ וְעוֹנֵ֣ן וְנִחֵ֔שׁ וְעָ֥שָׂה א֖וֹב וְיִדְּעֹנִ֑ים הִרְבָּ֗ה לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת הָרַ֛ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה לְהַכְעִֽיס׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made his son pass through fire: and he used divinations, and observed omens, and appointed pythons, and multiplied soothsayers, to do evil before the Lord, and to provoke him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käytti poikansa tulessa, ja otti vaarin lintuin lauluista ja merkeistä, ja piti noitia ja merkkein sanojia, ja teki paljon pahaa Herran edessä, jolla hän hänen vihoitti.
verses.king_james: And he made his son pass through the fire, and observed times, and used enchantments, and dealt with familiar spirits and wizards: he wrought much wickedness in the sight of the Lord, to provoke him to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit quoque idolum luci quem fecerat, in templo Domini, super quod locutus est Dominus ad David, et ad Salomonem filium ejus : In templo hoc, et in Jerusalem quam elegi de cunctis tribubus Israël, ponam nomen meum in sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֕שֶׂם אֶת־פֶּ֥סֶל הָאֲשֵׁרָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה בַּבַּ֗יִת אֲשֶׁ֨ר אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־דָּוִד֙ וְאֶל־שְׁלֹמֹ֣ה בְנ֔וֹ בַּבַּ֨יִת הַזֶּ֜ה וּבִירוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר בָּחַ֙רְתִּי֙ מִכֹּל֙ שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אָשִׂ֥ים אֶת־שְׁמִ֖י לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He set also an idol of the grove, which he had made, in the temple of the Lord: concerning which the Lord said to David, and to Solomon his son: In this temple, and in Jerusalem, which I have chosen out of all the tribes of Israel, I will put my name for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän pani myös metsistöjumalan, jonka hän tehnyt oli, huoneesen, josta Herra Davidille ja hänen pojallensa Salomolle sanonut oli: tähän huoneesen ja Jerusalemiin, jonka minä valinnut olen kaikista Israelin sukukunnista, panen minä nimeni ijankaikkisesti,
verses.king_james: And he set a graven image of the grove that he had made in the house, of which the Lord said to David, and to Solomon his son, In this house, and in Jerusalem, which I have chosen out of all tribes of Israel, will I put my name for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ultra non faciam commoveri pedem Israël de terra quam dedi patribus eorum : si tamen custodierint opere omnia quæ præcepi eis, et universam legem quam mandavit eis servus meus Moyses.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֣א אֹסִ֗יף לְהָנִיד֙ רֶ֣גֶל יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מִן־הָ֣אֲדָמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לַאֲבוֹתָ֑ם רַ֣ק ׀ אִם־יִשְׁמְר֣וּ לַעֲשׂ֗וֹת כְּכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוִּיתִ֔ים וּלְכׇ֨ל־הַתּוֹרָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֥ה אֹתָ֖ם עַבְדִּ֥י מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will no more make the feet of Israel to be moved out of the land, which I gave to their fathers: only if they will observe to do all that I have commanded them, according to the law which my servant Moses commanded them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja en liikuta enää Israelin jalkoja siitä maasta, jonka minä heidän isillensä antanut olen, jos he ainoastaan pitävät ja tekevät kaikki, mitä minä heille käskenyt olen, ja kaiken sen lain, minkä minun palveliani Moses heille käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: Neither will I make the feet of Israel move any more out of the land which I gave their fathers; only if they will observe to do according to all that I have commanded them, and according to all the law that my servant Moses commanded them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illi vero non audierunt : sed seducti sunt a Manasse, ut facerent malum super gentes quas contrivit Dominus a facie filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֖א שָׁמֵ֑עוּ וַיַּתְעֵ֤ם מְנַשֶּׁה֙ לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת אֶת־הָרָ֔ע מִ֨ן־הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר֙ הִשְׁמִ֣יד יְהֹוָ֔ה מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But they hearkened not: but were seduced by Manasses, to do evil more than the nations which the Lord destroyed before the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei he totelleet sitä, vaan Manasse vietteli heitä, niin että he tekivät pahemmin kuin pakanat, jotka Herra Israelin lasten edestä hävittänyt oli.
verses.king_james: But they hearkened not: and Manasseh seduced them to do more evil than did the nations whom the Lord destroyed before the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus in manu servorum suorum prophetarum, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה בְּיַד־עֲבָדָ֥יו הַנְּבִיאִ֖ים לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke in the hand of his servants, the prophets, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin puhui Herra palveliainsa prophetain kautta ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake by his servants the prophets, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia fecit Manasses rex Juda abominationes istas pessimas, super omnia quæ fecerunt Amorrhæi ante eum, et peccare fecit etiam Judam in immunditiis suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֩עַן֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָשָׂ֜ה מְנַשֶּׁ֤ה מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה֙ הַתֹּעֵב֣וֹת הָאֵ֔לֶּה הֵרַ֕ע מִכֹּ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשׂ֥וּ הָאֱמֹרִ֖י אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְפָנָ֑יו וַיַּחֲטִ֥א גַֽם־אֶת־יְהוּדָ֖ה בְּגִלּוּלָֽיו׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Because Manasses, king of Juda, hath done these most wicked abominations, beyond all that the Amorrhites did before him, and hath made Juda also to sin with his filthy doings:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että Manasse Juudan kuningas on nämät kauhistukset tehnyt, jotka pahemmat ovat kuin kaikki ne kauhistukset, joita Amorilaiset tehneet ovat, jotka hänen edellänsä olivat, ja on myös saattanut Juudan syntiä tekemään epäjumalillansa;
verses.king_james: Because Manasseh king of Judah hath done these abominations, and hath done wickedly above all that the Amorites did, which were before him, and hath made Judah also to sin with his idols:

verses.latin_vulgate: propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus Israël : Ecce ego inducam mala super Jerusalem et Judam, ut quicumque audierit, tinniant ambæ aures ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הִנְנִי֙ מֵבִ֣יא רָעָ֔ה עַל־יְרֽוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם וִֽיהוּדָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר֙ כׇּל־[שֹׁ֣מְעָ֔הּ] (שמעיו) תִּצַּ֖לְנָה שְׁתֵּ֥י אׇזְנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord, the God of Israel: Behold, I will bring on evils upon Jerusalem and Juda: that whosoever shall hear of them, both his ears shall tingle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sanoo Herra Israelin Jumala näin: katso, minä saatan vahingon Juudan ja Jerusalemin päälle, että kuka ikänä sen kuulee, pitää hänen molemmat korvansa soiman.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God of Israel, Behold, I am bringing such evil upon Jerusalem and Judah, that whosoever heareth of it, both his ears shall tingle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extendam super Jerusalem funiculum Samariæ, et pondus domus Achab : et delebo Jerusalem, sicut deleri solent tabulæ : et delens vertam, et ducam crebrius stylum super faciem ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָטִ֣יתִי עַל־יְרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם אֵ֚ת קָ֣ו שֹׁמְר֔וֹן וְאֶת־מִשְׁקֹ֖לֶת בֵּ֣ית אַחְאָ֑ב וּמָחִ֨יתִי אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֜͏ִם כַּאֲשֶׁר־יִמְחֶ֤ה אֶת־הַצַּלַּ֙חַת֙ מָחָ֔ה וְהָפַ֖ךְ עַל־פָּנֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will stretch over Jerusalem the line of Samaria, and the weight of the house of Achab: and I will efface Jerusalem, as writings tables are wont to be effaced, and I will erase and turn it, and draw the pencil often over the face thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä vedän Samarian mittanuoran Jerusalemin ylitse, ja Ahabin huoneen painomitan, ja virutan Jerusalemin niinkuin astiat virutetaan: ne virutetaan ja käännetään kumollensa.
verses.king_james: And I will stretch over Jerusalem the line of Samaria, and the plummet of the house of Ahab: and I will wipe Jerusalem as a man wipeth a dish, wiping it, and turning it upside down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dimittam vero reliquias hæreditatis meæ, et tradam eas in manus inimicorum ejus, eruntque in vastitatem, et in rapinam cunctis adversariis suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָטַשְׁתִּ֗י אֵ֚ת שְׁאֵרִ֣ית נַחֲלָתִ֔י וּנְתַתִּ֖ים בְּיַ֣ד אֹיְבֵיהֶ֑ם וְהָי֥וּ לְבַ֛ז וְלִמְשִׁסָּ֖ה לְכׇל־אֹיְבֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will leave the remnants of my inheritance, and will deliver them into the hands of their enemies: and they shall become a prey, and a spoil to all their enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä hylkään jääneet minun perimisestäni ja annan heidät vihamiestensä käsiin, että heidän pitää oleman kaikille vihollisillensa saaliiksi ja ryöstöksi:
verses.king_james: And I will forsake the remnant of mine inheritance, and deliver them into the hand of their enemies; and they shall become a prey and a spoil to all their enemies;

verses.latin_vulgate: eo quod fecerint malum coram me, et perseveraverint irritantes me, ex die qua egressi sunt patres eorum ex Ægypto usque ad hanc diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗עַן אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָשׂ֤וּ אֶת־הָרַע֙ בְּעֵינַ֔י וַיִּהְי֥וּ מַכְעִסִ֖ים אֹתִ֑י מִן־הַיּ֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָצְא֤וּ אֲבוֹתָם֙ מִמִּצְרַ֔יִם וְעַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have done evil before me, and have continued to provoke me, from the day that their fathers came out of Egypt, even unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he tekivät sitä, mikä paha oli minun silmäini edessä, ja ovat minun vihoittaneet siitä päivästä, jona heidän isänsä läksivät Egyptistä, tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: Because they have done that which was evil in my sight, and have provoked me to anger, since the day their fathers came forth out of Egypt, even unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Insuper et sanguinem innoxium fudit Manasses multum nimis, donec impleret Jerusalem usque ad os : absque peccatis suis quibus peccare fecit Judam, ut faceret malum coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם֩ דָּ֨ם נָקִ֜י שָׁפַ֤ךְ מְנַשֶּׁה֙ הַרְבֵּ֣ה מְאֹ֔ד עַ֛ד אֲשֶׁר־מִלֵּ֥א אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם פֶּ֣ה לָפֶ֑ה לְבַ֤ד מֵֽחַטָּאתוֹ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֶחֱטִ֣יא אֶת־יְהוּדָ֔ה לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover, Manasses shed also very much innocent blood, till he filled Jerusalem up to the mouth: besides his sins, wherewith he made Juda to sin, to do evil before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Manasse vuodatti myös paljon viatointa verta, siihen asti että Jerusalem sieltä ja täältä täynnä oli, ilman niitä syntejä, joilla hän Juudan saatti syntiä tekemään, että he tekivät pahaa Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: Moreover Manasseh shed innocent blood very much, till he had filled Jerusalem from one end to another; beside his sin wherewith he made Judah to sin, in doing that which was evil in the sight of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Manasse, ut universa quæ fecit, et peccatum ejus quod peccavit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Juda ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֨תֶר דִּבְרֵ֤י מְנַשֶּׁה֙ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה וְחַטָּאת֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָטָ֑א הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the rest of the acts of Manasses, and all that he did, and his sin, which he sinned, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Manassesta sanomista on ja kaikista, mitä hän tehnyt on, ja niistä synneistä, jotka hän teki: eikö ne ole kirjoitetut Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Manasseh, and all that he did, and his sin that he sinned, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivitque Manasses cum patribus suis, et sepultus est in horto domus suæ, in horto Oza : et regnavit Amon filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב מְנַשֶּׁה֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקָּבֵ֥ר בְּגַן־בֵּית֖וֹ בְּגַן־עֻזָּ֑א וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אָמ֥וֹן בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Manasses slept with his fathers, and was buried in the garden of his own house, in the garden of Oza: and Amon, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Manasse nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin huoneensa yrttitarhaan, joka oli Ussan yrttitarha; ja hänen poikansa Amon tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Manasseh slept with his fathers, and was buried in the garden of his own house, in the garden of Uzza: and Amon his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viginti duorum annorum erat Amon cum regnare cœpisset : duobus quoque annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Messalemeth filia Harus de Jeteba.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־עֶשְׂרִ֨ים וּשְׁתַּ֤יִם שָׁנָה֙ אָמ֣וֹן בְּמׇלְכ֔וֹ וּשְׁתַּ֣יִם שָׁנִ֔ים מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ מְשֻׁלֶּ֥מֶת בַּת־חָר֖וּץ מִן־יׇטְבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Two and twenty years old was Amon when he began to reign, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Messalemeth, the daughter of Harus, of Jeteba.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahden ajastaikainen kolmattakymmentä oli Amon tullessansa Juudan kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kaksi ajastakaa Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä nimi oli Mesulemet Hatsurin tytär Jotbasta.
verses.king_james: Amon was twenty and two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Meshullemeth, the daughter of Haruz of Jotbah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque malum in conspectu Domini, sicut fecerat Manasses pater ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָׂ֖ה מְנַשֶּׁ֥ה אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did evil in the sight of the Lord, as Manasses, his father, had done.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki sitä, mikä Herralle ei kelvannut, niinkuin hänen isänsä Manasse tehnyt oli.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord, as his father Manasseh did.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ambulavit in omni via per quam ambulaverat pater ejus, servivitque immunditiis quibus servierat pater ejus, et adoravit eas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֕לֶךְ בְּכׇל־הַדֶּ֖רֶךְ אֲשֶׁר־הָלַ֣ךְ אָבִ֑יו וַֽיַּעֲבֹ֗ד אֶת־הַגִּלֻּלִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָבַ֣ד אָבִ֔יו וַיִּשְׁתַּ֖חוּ לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he walked in all the way in which his father had walked: and he served the abominations which his father had served, and he adored them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vaelsi kaikkia niitä teitä, joita hänen isänsä vaeltanut oli, ja palveli epäjumalia, joita hänen isänsä palvellut oli, ja kumarsi niitä,
verses.king_james: And he walked in all the way that his father walked in, and served the idols that his father served, and worshipped them:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dereliquit Dominum Deum patrum suorum, et non ambulavit in via Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲזֹ֕ב אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י אֲבֹתָ֑יו וְלֹ֥א הָלַ֖ךְ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And forsook the Lord, the God of his fathers, and walked not in the way of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja luopui Herrasta isäinsä Jumalasta, ja ei vaeltanut Herran tiellä.
verses.king_james: And he forsook the Lord God of his fathers, and walked not in the way of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tetenderuntque ei insidias servi sui, et interfecerunt regem in domo sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְשְׁר֥וּ עַבְדֵי־אָמ֖וֹן עָלָ֑יו וַיָּמִ֥יתוּ אֶת־הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ בְּבֵיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his servants plotted against him, and slew the king in his own house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Amonin palveliat tekivät liiton häntä vastaan ja tappoivat kuninkaan omassa huoneessansa.
verses.king_james: And the servants of Amon conspired against him, and slew the king in his own house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Percussit autem populus terræ omnes qui conjuraverant contra regem Amon, et constituerunt sibi regem Josiam filium ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּךְ֙ עַם־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַקֹּשְׁרִ֖ים עַל־הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אָמ֑וֹן וַיַּמְלִ֧יכוּ עַם־הָאָ֛רֶץ אֶת־יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon: and made Josias, his son, their king in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta maakunnan kansa löi kaikki ne kuoliaaksi, jotka olivat liiton tehneet kuningas Amonia vastaan, ja kansa teki Josian hänen poikansa kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon; and the people of the land made Josiah his son king in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Amon quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Juda ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י אָמ֖וֹן אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of the acts of Amon, which he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä Amon enempi tehnyt on: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Amon which he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Sepelieruntque eum in sepulchro suo, in horto Oza : et regnavit Josias filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְבֹּ֥ר אֹת֛וֹ בִּקְבֻרָת֖וֹ בְּגַן־עֻזָּ֑א וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they buried him in his sepulchre, in the garden of Oza: and his son, Josias, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän haudattiin omaan hautaansa Ussan yrttitarhassa, ja hänen poikansa Josia tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And he was buried in his sepulchre in the garden of Uzza: and Josiah his son reigned in his stead.
